text.message: I don’t want to get in the middle of this
យោុ​ចានហាវេ​ឹោោដ​ផោរត
You literally said you didn’t want to get in middle of it? Exact trade I offered you?
you can have the wood port
This is just bs though orange?
I clearly had it on the same trade?
But clearly 1 is useful for me the others aren’t?
But it’s not that, it’s that he said he wouldn’t trade with either of us? Then did?
But ultimately we need red to connect
Orange you should block our wheat
Red we still need you to connect
Black will be at 9 next turn
red u have to take army
Blue is on 9 with one road
I can't really, need 5 roads to get it
Look at the direction of my roads, its 5
